title: Bookkeeper
description: Vanguard is seeking a Bookkeeper to manage financial records and ensure accuracy of accounting transactions. You'll record entries, reconcile accounts, and maintain financial documentation. Work remotely for a premier investment management company serving millions of investors.
responsibilities: Record transactions in accounting system and post to general ledger
Reconcile bank accounts and credit card statements monthly
Prepare financial reports and account summaries
Process vendor invoices and expense reports
Maintain organized financial records and documentation

requirements.education: High school diploma or equivalent; accounting coursework preferred

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
